# GoFrame Generated Files

Do not modify files that begin with this generated-file prefix:

```go
// =================================================================================
// This file is auto-generated by the GoFrame CLI tool. You may modify it as needed.
// =================================================================================
```

These files are produced by `gf gen` commands such as `gf gen ctrl`,
`gf gen dao`, `gf gen enums`, `gf gen pb`, `gf gen pbentity`, and
`gf gen service`.

If changes are needed in one of these files, update the source definitions and
regenerate with the appropriate `gf gen` command instead of editing the generated
file directly.
